CustomField.description: Value for the SWOT Analysis portion of the Account Plan Score
CustomField.formula:
IF(pqcrush__Default_Plan_Scoring__c, ( IF( $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Score_Object__c, CASE(1, IF(pqcrush__SWOT_Count__c < $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Count_BP_Low__c, 1, 0), 0, IF(pqcrush__SWOT_Count__c < $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Count_BP_Mid__c, 1, 0), $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Score_BP_Low__c, IF(pqcrush__SWOT_Count__c < $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Count_BP_High__c, 1, 0), $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Score_BP_Mid__c, $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Score_BP_High__c) * IF( $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Use_Time_Decay__c, CASE(1, IF(TODAY() - DATEVALUE(pqcrush__SWOT_Max_LMD__c) < $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Time_BP_Low__c, 1, 0), 1, IF(TODAY() - DATEVALUE(pqcrush__SWOT_Max_LMD__c) < $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Time_BP_Mid__c, 1, 0), $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Time_BP_Mult_Low__c, IF(TODAY() - DATEVALUE(pqcrush__SWOT_Max_LMD__c) < $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Time_BP_High__c, 1, 0), $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Time_BP_Mult_Mid__c, $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Time_BP_Mult_High__c), 1), 0)),
(IF( pqcrush__SWOT_Count__c > $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Threshold_Limit__c , $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Category_Point_Total__c, (pqcrush__SWOT_Count__c / $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Threshold_Limit__c)* $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Category_Point_Total__c)) * IF( $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Use_Time_Decay__c, CASE(1, IF(TODAY() - DATEVALUE(pqcrush__SWOT_Max_LMD__c) < $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Time_BP_Low__c, 1, 0), 1, IF(TODAY() - DATEVALUE(pqcrush__SWOT_Max_LMD__c) < $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Time_BP_Mid__c, 1, 0), $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Time_BP_Mult_Low__c, IF(TODAY() - DATEVALUE(pqcrush__SWOT_Max_LMD__c) < $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Time_BP_High__c, 1, 0), $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Time_BP_Mult_Mid__c, $CustomMetadata.pqcrush__PQ_AP_Score__mdt.pqcrush__SWOT.pqcrush__Time_BP_Mult_High__c), 1))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: You can modify this by adjusting the custom metadata record corresponding to the SWOT Values
CustomField.label: SWOT Analysis Score
